sentences.arabic: فِي ظِلِّ الِاعْتِمَادِ الْمُتَزَايِدِ عَلَى الْفَضَاءِ السِّيبِرَانِيِّ، أَصْبَحَتْ حِمَايَةُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ ضَرُورَةً قُصْوَى لِلْأَمْنِ الْقَوْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: U svjetlu sve veće ovisnosti o kibernetičkom prostoru, zaštita digitalnih informacija postala je krajnja nužnost za nacionalnu sigurnost.
sentences.translationEn: In light of the increasing reliance on cyberspace, protecting digital information has become an utmost necessity for national security.

sentences.arabic: يَتِمُّ تَطْوِيرُ بَرْمَجِيَّاتِ التَّشْفِيرِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ لِتَّصَدِّي لِلْهَجَمَاتِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَسْتَهْدِفُ الْبِنَى التَّحْتِيَّةَ الْحَسَّاسَةَ.
sentences.translation: Razvijaju se složeni softveri za enkripciju kako bi se suprotstavili elektronskim napadima koji ciljaju na osjetljive infrastrukture.
sentences.translationEn: Complex encryption software is being developed to counter electronic attacks targeting sensitive infrastructures.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِافْتِقَارَ إِلَى وَعْيٍ تِقْنِيٍّ شَامِلٍ قَدْ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى كَوَارِثَ مَالِيَّةٍ وَتَقْنِيَّةٍ لَا تُحْمَدُ عُقْبَاهَا.
sentences.translation: Nedostatak sveobuhvatne tehničke svijesti može dovesti do finansijskih i tehničkih katastrofa s nesagledivim posljedicama.
sentences.translationEn: The lack of comprehensive technical awareness may lead to financial and technical disasters with dire consequences.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، تُنَظَّمُ دَوْرَاتٌ تَدْرِيبِيَّةٌ مُكَثَّفَةٌ فِي الْمُؤَسَّسَاتِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ لِتَعْزِيزِ مَهَارَاتِ الدِّفَاعِ الرَّقْمِيِّ لَدَى الْمُوَظَّفِينَ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga se u arapskim institucijama organiziraju intenzivni treninzi radi jačanja vještina digitalne odbrane kod zaposlenika.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, intensive training courses are organized in Arab institutions to enhance digital defense skills among employees.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا تَعَاوَنَتِ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتُ الدَّوْلِيَّةُ فِي تَبَادُلِ الْخِبْرَاتِ، فَسَيُصْبِحُ مِنَ الصَّعْبِ عَلَى الْمُخْتَرِقِينَ اخْتِرَاقُ الْأَنْظِمَةِ الْمُحَصَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ako međunarodne zajednice budu sarađivale u razmjeni iskustava, hakerima će postati teško probiti utvrđene sisteme.
sentences.translationEn: If international communities cooperate in exchanging expertise, it will become difficult for hackers to breach fortified systems.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، يَبْقَى الِابْتِكَارُ فِي مَجَالِ الْأَمْنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِيِّ هُوَ السَّبِيلَ الْوَحِيدَ لِضَمَانِ اسْتِدَامَةِ الِاقْتِصَادِ الرَّقْمِيِّ الْعَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Tako inovacija u oblasti informacione sigurnosti ostaje jedini put za osiguranje održivosti globalne digitalne ekonomije.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, innovation in the field of information security remains the only way to ensure the sustainability of the global digital economy.
